 13 views [...] Most Informative

•1 review

#### What's great

Just tried out MCP360 — super cool idea! It’s basically an App Store for AI agents, giving you access to a bunch of tools all in one place. Really easy to use and great for anyone working with AI or just wanting to boost productivity. Excited to see how it grows and what new tools get added!

#### What needs improvement

All good

#### vs Alternatives

I chose MCP360 because it brings everything together in one place — instead of juggling tons of APIs and tools, I can access them all through a single platform. It’s super easy to set up, works well with existing AI workflows, and helps boost productivity right away. Plus, the free plan made it easy to try out before committing.
